title: Consumer Insights Analyst - Fully Remote
required_skills: 3+ years of experience in market research, insights, or marketing strategy
Current or recent experience at a Fortune 1000 company, top consulting firm, or leading agency
Hands-on experience using insights to drive decisions
Familiarity with consumer research, segmentation, or survey analysis
matched_skills: 4+ years of experience in market research, insights, and marketing strategy
Experience at HSBC (Fortune 1000 equivalent) and Minth Group (large international corporation)
Hands-on insights used to drive decisions (executive dashboards, competitive intelligence, financial analytics)
missing_skills: Survey analysis / primary consumer research methodology
Explicit Fortune 1000 / top-tier consulting firm or leading agency background (HSBC qualifies but is not core marketing/insights agency context)
core_responsibilities: Use an AI-powered product for market research synthesis, consumer insights generation, and marketing strategy recommendations
Evaluate AI outputs from an end-user perspective focusing on relevance, strategic quality, and business applicability
Provide structured feedback on gaps, inaccuracies, and improvements for real-world use
Simulate real workflows by reviewing reports, validating insights, and making decisions based on outputs
recommended_emphasis: Highlight HSBC as a globally recognized Fortune 1000 financial institution to satisfy the enterprise-pedigree requirement
Lead with market research synthesis and consumer insights work from Minth Group (EMEA/APAC competitive intelligence, 12 product lines) and HSBC (6-workstream programme analytics)
Emphasize customer segmentation and market intelligence capabilities directly matching JD language
Stress executive-level data storytelling and analytical report delivery as proof of insights-to-decision workflow
Note cross-industry breadth (e-commerce, manufacturing, FinTech, shipping) to demonstrate versatility for AI product evaluation

company_info.size_raw: 6,189 total employees (LinkedIn hiring & headcount section embedded in JD text of related Mercor postings)
